title: Easy Freezing
description: A mod that allows you to Freeze Time around you at will! Try with multiplayer and things get confusing fast!
body:
Easy Freezing

A mod where you can do ALL of the below:

- Shoot arrows
- Swim (cause you don't take damage, you can swim forever)
- Throw a trident
- ~~Explode a Creeper~~

There are a lot of fun things you can do with this!

**READ FIRST:**
Instructions: Hit G and do stuff.

**UPDATES:**
Update 6/26/25: Added Improved Logo

This took a really long time to make, so I'd be greatful it if you Subscribed! :D
[https://www.youtube.com/@linktheredstonecreeper](https://www.youtube.com/@linktheredstonecreeper)
